backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for Snapgram implementing user profiles, posts, follows, likes, and comments with access-control authorization guards on all mutating operations.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old diary-based actor state (profiles with name, diary entries) into the new Snapgram actor state (profiles with displayName/bio/avatarUrl, posts, follows, likes, comments).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented Snapgram features (frontend pages, React Query hooks, visual theme) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short descriptions for each frontend source file, covering pages, hooks, components, styles, and face-detection assets in the Snapgram project.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind stylesheet defining the Snapgram OKLCH color palette (warm coral/rose/orange) as CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/public/models/face-api/INSTALLA: Notice explaining that the face-api.js npm package must be manually added to package.json to enable the face detection feature.
frontend/public/models/face-api/README.m: Instructions for downloading the Tiny Face Detector model weight files from the face-api.js repository and placing them in the public models directory.
frontend/public/models/face-api/tiny_fac: Placeholder binary file for the Tiny Face Detector model weights shard, which must be replaced with the actual downloaded model file.
Placeholder JSON manifest for the Tiny Face Detector model; the actual manifest must be downloaded from the face-api.js models repository.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all Snapgram routes (landing, feed, explore, create, profile, post detail, edit profile) and wraps the app with ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that triggers Internet Identity login or logout, shows a spinner during login, and clears the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that collects display name, bio, and avatar URL from a new user and saves their profile via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` hook.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAuth: A wrapper component that renders children only if the user is authenticated via Internet Identity, otherwise shows a sign-in card with a login button.
frontend/src/components/comments/AddComm: A form component with a textarea and submit button that allows authenticated users to add a comment to a specific post by ID.
frontend/src/components/comments/Comment: Renders a list of comments with author avatars, display names, timestamps, and content, showing an empty state when no comments exist.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: The main application shell providing a sticky header with logo and desktop navigation, a mobile bottom tab bar, footer with sponsored links, and a profile setup dialog for new users.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomTab: A fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile viewports with tabs for Home, Explore, Create, and Profile routes.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sponsored: Conditionally renders a sponsored external link in the footer based on the `sponsoredLinkConfig` configuration object.
frontend/src/components/post/PostCard.ts: Displays a single post card with author info, content, optional image, timestamp, and like/comment action buttons with optimistic like toggling.
frontend/src/components/profile/FollowBu: A button component that toggles follow/unfollow state for a target user, checking current follower list to determine initial state.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileH: Displays a user's profile header including avatar, display name, bio, follow button (for other users), and stats for posts, followers, and following counts.
frontend/src/config/sponsoredLink.ts: Reads sponsored link URL and text from Vite environment variables and exports a config object, returning null if no URL is configured.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the currently authenticated caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing a React context provider and hook for login, logout, and identity state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useSnapgramQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all Snapgram social features including posts (create, fetch by user/all), likes, comments, follows, and profile updates against the backend actor.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx: Page component for creating a new post with text content and an optional image URL, protected by authentication.
frontend/src/pages/EditProfilePage.tsx: Auth-protected page that allows the current user to update their display name, bio, and avatar URL.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Auth-protected page that displays all community posts sorted by recency, with loading skeletons and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/pages/HomeFeedPage.tsx: Displays a personalized feed of posts from the current user and people they follow, with loading skeletons and empty-state prompts to explore or create posts.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with a hero section, Internet Identity login/redirect button, and a features grid highlighting the app's social capabilities.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetailPage.tsx: Shows a single post's full detail view including author info, like toggle, comments list, and an add-comment form, fetched by post ID from the URL.
frontend/src/pages/UserProfilePage.tsx: Renders a user's profile header (avatar, bio, follower/following counts) and their posts list, with an edit button shown when viewing one's own profile.
frontend/src/types/face-api.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file, likely a placeholder for face-api.js type definitions.
Empty utility file, likely a placeholder for face detection canvas overlay logic.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, serif font stack, extended border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes for accordion and other UI components.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for a social media app called 'snapgram', including architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and image requirements. Serves as the central build-planning manifest with versioned feature records.
